summary.shape_sentence: Wide two-way RTH session with early volatility, a strong late-morning upside trend, upper balance through early afternoon, a 15:00 selloff, then late recovery into the close.

goat.note: Standout move was the reversal from the 10:30 washout into the 11:30 reclaim near 29440.

red_circles.behavior: Bearish pivots clustered near failed pushes into the 29460-29478 supply band and into the 15:00 breakdown.

green_circles.behavior: Bullish pivots formed after washouts into 29310-29335 and later near 29375-29390.

orange_banks_supply.behavior: Primary supply zone near 29460-29478 was repeatedly tested and briefly swept, but not cleanly accepted above.

blue_banks_demand.behavior: Demand near 29310-29335 and 29375-29390 was respected after flushes.

time_markers.10am_blue: First major downside rotation after the opening spike, trading near 29320-29340.
time_markers.12pm_red: Pressing the upper range near 29465-29475 after the strongest bullish drive.
time_markers.2pm_green: Upper balance retest of 29460-29475 without clean continuation.
time_markers.4pm_yellow: Closed near 29429 after late recovery from the 15:00 selloff, below HOD but above session midpoint.

takeaway: Bullish recovery day with an early volatility flush, a clean late-morning trend leg, afternoon upper balance, and a failed 15:00 breakdown that reclaimed into the close.
